_note: DF (dark-fantasy) lane EXEMPLAR set. Prepared GPU-fenced (nothing was cooked). Cook AFTER the ComfyUI kitchen session to validate the tuned dark-fantasy checkpoint/LoRA/CFG. Two exemplars: a portrait 'style card' (the lane acid-test — faces are where a style breaks first, per the anime-lane finding) and a world-card cover. Idempotent by id; keeps:'cooked' auto-keeps whatever lands (flagged for review via scripts/art/review.mjs).

slotValues.attire: battered leather armor beneath a heavy hooded cloak
